subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! That which was sent unto thee from Mine Afnán hath been brought into the presence of the Throne. Verily, the Tree respondeth unto its branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی قد حضر لدی العرش ما ارسل الیک من افنانی ان السدره تجیب افنانها
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @goodly deeds; actions
